title: Recycling Depot Routes: Maximum Partial-Latin Schedule Completion
strategies: schedule nothing new -- echo the prefilled grid (calibration baseline, F == prefilled count)
naive row-major fill with the smallest fitting depot -- no lookahead, traps later cells
MRV + least-constraining-value constraint propagation with forward checking -- fills far more cells
backtracking / exact partial-Latin completion search for a full N*N solution when time permits
matching / flow-based row-completion to maximize filled cells per row-column deficiency
